etymology.description: 人(人) (rén, "person") + 厂(厂) (chǎng, "cliff") = person under a cliff -> danger
etymology.interpretation: The character厃 (wěi, "danger") is formed by combining 人(人) (rén, "person") and 厂(厂) (chǎng, "cliff"). The image of a person standing under a cliff intuitively suggests a precarious or dangerous situation, thus conveying the meaning of "danger."
